---
name: CLI or docs clarity
about: Report or propose an improvement to how erdos-problems explains itself
title: "[clarity] "
labels: ["docs"]
assignees: ""
---

## Surface

- README
- CLI command output
- docs
- contribution flow
- pack documentation

## What was unclear

Describe the exact command, page, or workflow step that caused confusion.

## What you expected

Describe the wording, command output, or doc link you expected to find.

## Suggested fix

If you have one, propose a tighter explanation, example, or output change.

## Reproduction

Include any command sequence, for example:

```bash
node bin/erdos upstream show
node bin/erdos workspace show
```
